name: External-Domain User Assigned Internal Okta App
description: Detects active users on external personal domains assigned to non-test Okta applications.
query: SELECT DISTINCT a.assignee_id AS id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, a.assignee_id) AS account_name, u.email, a.app_id, COALESCE(a.app_label, app.label, app.name) AS app_name FROM okta_app_assignments a JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = a.assignee_id LEFT JOIN okta_applications app ON app.id = a.app_id WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(a.assignee_type, '')) = 'USER' AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND LOWER(COALESCE(a.status, 'active')) IN ('active', 'assigned') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) RLIKE '.*@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com$' AND NOT LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_label, app.label, app.name, '')) RLIKE '.*(test|sandbox|demo).*'
remediation: Review external-domain user assignments to internal applications and remove or replace with governed partner identities.
